description:
A command line interface for the Nitrokey FIDO2, Nitrokey Start, Nitrokey 3 and NetHSM.


What's Changed
- Add support for nistp384 algorithm in PIV by @sosthene-nitrokey in #755
- Further fixes after change to ruff by @mmerklinger in #757
- Add import-pkcs12 command for NetHSM by @mmerklinger in #759
- Add Jan Knittel to maintainers file by @robin-nitrokey in #760
- Update dependencies and release v0.12.3 by @robin-nitrokey in #764
Full Changelog: v0.12.2...v0.12.3
